title: Dekton Geckogrip Utensil Hooks 3pc Chrome - Strong Adhesive Wall Hooks, Rental Safe, Holds up to 500g, Easy to Apply & Remove - Ideal for Kitchen Utensils & Household Storage
features: Strong Hold Capacity:Each Geckogrip hook supports up to 500g, perfect for organizing lightweight items such as kitchen utensils, keys, or accessories.
Rental Safe & Damage-Free:Easy to apply and remove without leaving marks, making them ideal for tenants, students, or temporary spaces.
Compact & Practical:Measuring approx. 25mm x 25mm, these hooks offer a discreet, space-saving solution for everyday household organization.
Quick & Easy Application:Adhesive backing ensures simple, tool-free installation on smooth, clean surfaces without drilling or screws.
Versatile Finishes:Available in White, Chrome, or Clear to complement any décor, blending functionality with style.
description: The Dekton Geckogrip Utensil Hooks (3pc set) provide a simple, stylish, and damage-free way to organize everyday household items. Each hook can hold up to 500g, making them ideal for kitchen utensils, keys, or small accessories. Designed with a rental safe adhesive backing, they can be applied and removed easily without damaging walls, making them perfect for tenants, students, or temporary living spaces. Measuring 25mm x 25mm, these hooks are compact yet strong, offering a discreet and space-saving storage solution. Installation is quick and tool-free — simply apply to smooth, clean surfaces without the need for screws or drilling. Available in White, Chrome, or Clear finishes, these hooks blend seamlessly into any décor, offering both practicality and style for kitchens, bathrooms, or general home organization.
